name: M.'s Quick Mayonnaise
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the oil slowly into the creamed butter.
2. Add the mustard, salt, and fructose to the mixture.
3. Slowly beat in the vinegar.
4. Finally, beat in the egg until smooth.
5. If the mayonnaise curdles, continue beating until it is smooth.
NOTE: You can use a blender instead of hand mixing. Also, remember not to leave fresh mayonnaise out at room temperature for too long; always seal it tightly.
